turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ordering Coffee at a Café

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, um, I want to order coffee.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. What kind of coffee would you like?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It is my first time here, so what is popular?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Our popular one is cappuccino. It has milk and foam.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Uh, actually, is anything caffeine free?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we have decaf options. We can make a decaf cappuccino or latte.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… sorry, what is decaf? Is it no caffeine?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s right. Decaf has no caffeine, or very little.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, I want decaf cappuccino.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. What size would you like?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… large size.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. What milk would you like?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: What is most popular? Sorry… I mean, what milk people choose most.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Most people choose oat milk.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, I want that. Oat milk.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Large decaf cappuccino with oat milk. Would you like anything to eat?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… do you have banana bread?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we have a banana shake.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Uh… no, not shake. Bread. Banana bread.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh, banana bread. Yes, we do. Would you like it warmed?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please. One.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem. It’ll be ready in about five minutes. Would you like to have it here or take it away?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Here.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. You can sit anywhere inside.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, thank you.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Do you have a student ID for a discount?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh… I don’t have today. So I cannot use it, right?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s right. You can use it next time.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Actually… I want to change. Sorry, change to iced.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem. I’ll make it an iced decaf cappuccino.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, iced decaf. Thank you.
